name: Table Panel
structurePatterns: panel only carries bottom border-radius (top is flush against an external header/toolbar)
tbody rows separated by --border-1; numeric cells use --code-editor-font-family + tabular-nums
usageHints: Use when a separate header/toolbar sits ABOVE the panel (e.g., dashboard 'Recent activity' card with its own title bar). The panel only renders the bottom rounding.
For self-contained tables with their own toolbar+footer rounding, use the standard .ds-table-wrap component instead.
Pair with .ds-tablepanel__foot for pagination/summary row at the bottom.
doNotInvent: No selection / sort / column-resize / sticky-header defined
Top corners are intentionally squared off
unknowns: vertical scrolling behavior beyond a fixed row count
